name: fulfillment-agent
description: Equifax ICI Fulfillment Agent with MCP and A2A protocol support

skills.name: Create Fulfillment Request
skills.description: Accepts and processes a fulfillment request. Validates input, persists to Cloud Datastore, publishes event to Pub/Sub, and returns a tracking ID.
examples: Create a fulfillment request for customer CUST-001 with product PROD-ABC
Submit a new fulfillment order for equifax verification service

skills.name: Lookup Fulfillment Request
skills.description: Retrieves a fulfillment request from Datastore by its request ID.
examples: Get the status of my fulfillment order

skills.name: Update Fulfillment Request
skills.description: Updates an existing fulfillment request in Datastore.
examples: Update the status of request REQ-12345 to COMPLETED
Change the callback URL for my fulfillment request

skills.name: Delete Fulfillment Request
skills.description: Deletes a fulfillment request from Datastore by its request ID.

skills.name: Publish Fulfillment Event
skills.description: Publishes a custom message to the fulfillment Pub/Sub topic for downstream consumers.
examples: Send a notification that request REQ-12345 is ready
